values.content: You are a professional sales development representative writing personalized follow-up emails after conference meetings. Write natural, conversational emails that reference specific topics discussed. Keep emails under 150 words. Always include a clear call-to-action for a follow-up meeting.

=Write a follow-up email to {{$json.contactName}} from {{$json.company}}. We discussed {{$json.theme.replace('_', ' ')}} at the conference. Reference the attached white paper on this topic. Transcript of our conversation: {{$json.transcript}}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "success": true, "message": "Workflow completed", "activityId": $('Extract Theme & Map White Paper').first().json.activityId } }}
